title: Document bee herding enable/disable/status CLI verbs in README.md and SKILL.md
action: Edit skills/bee-herding/README.md (step 3 'enable dispatch' block, and the 'Stop and resume' disable-without-stopping line) and skills/bee-herding/SKILL.md (Dispatch role Sec 5's owner-marker paragraph) to mention the bee herding enable/disable/status CLI verbs alongside the existing touch/rm marker instructions -- prose only, no behavior change. Then propagate to the 4 mirror trees (.claude/skills, .agents/skills, .claude-plugin/skills, .codex-plugin/skills) via node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply and node scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs, then node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write to resync the manifest.

truths: README.md and SKILL.md mention bee herding enable/disable/status next to every existing touch/rm bee-herding.enable instruction
the bee-herding.stop marker instructions are untouched (different marker, out of scope)
all 5 copies of README.md and SKILL.md (source + 4 mirrors) stay byte-identical after sync

trace.outcome: Added bee herding enable/disable/status CLI verb mentions next to every touch/rm bee-herding.enable instruction in skills/bee-herding/README.md and SKILL.md (bee-herding.stop marker instructions left untouched, different marker). Synced to all 4 mirrors via onboard_bee.mjs --apply + render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs, all 5 copies byte-identical. Regenerated release-manifest.json. Full verify 88/88 green.
